stepsSection.title: PROCESS
stepsSection.subtitle: How we work
stepsSection.easyStart: We guide every transaction through a clear, strategic, and secure process.
stepsSection.step1Desc: We establish communication, study the market, and determine a strategic value.
stepsSection.step2Desc: We design the commercial and legal strategy.
stepsSection.step3Desc: Web publication, contact with prospective clients, and LOI intake.
stepsSection.step4Desc: We structure and refine proposals to reach viable terms.
stepsSection.step5Desc: Legal follow-up, guarantees, and risk control throughout the process.
stepsSection.step6Desc: We complete the transaction successfully and ensure compliance.

aboutUs.subtitle: Real Estate and Business Expansion
aboutUs.intro: At ZeVi | Capital, we believe a property should not remain idle. Your investment should work, not wait.
aboutUs.whoWeAreText: To be a leading firm in business expansion and strategic real estate structuring, recognized for connecting opportunities, capital, and territory while driving company growth and optimizing asset value through safe, intelligent, and sustainable solutions.
aboutUs.ourMissionText: To deliver integrated solutions that combine commercial strategy, technical analysis, legal backing, and operational execution, facilitating both business expansion and the structured commercialization of real estate assets with certainty, efficiency, and value in every transaction.

servicesSection.title: Your investment should work, not wait.
servicesSection.lead: We promote your property through tailored strategies aimed at qualified clients, whether for sale or lease.
servicesSection.supportingText: Our goal is to help you secure the greatest possible return with efficiency, transparency, and commitment. Money, like water, must flow to create life. Do not let your resources stagnate.
servicesSection.service1Desc: Strategy, market analysis, and proposal structuring to achieve viable and profitable transactions.
servicesSection.service2Desc: Digital and traditional promotion focused on positioning and attracting qualified clients.
servicesSection.service3Desc: Comprehensive legal support to ensure asset security and reduce legal and tax risks.

expansionSection.title: Strategic business expansion
expansionSection.paragraph1: We know a company is not just a business. It is vision, effort, and history.
expansionSection.paragraph2: Expanding a brand is not only about opening new locations. It is about doing it with intelligence, analysis, and strategy.
expansionSection.paragraph3: At ZeVi | Capital, we support companies seeking to grow on solid foundations while minimizing risks and maximizing opportunities.
expansionSection.closing: We design solutions aligned with each client's vision and wealth goals. When the right vision meets the right strategy, extraordinary things are created.

insurance.subtitle: Comprehensive insurance solutions tailored for your Canada property investments. Secure your assets with our expert insurance services.
insurance.propertyInsuranceDesc: Complete coverage for your property against damage, natural disasters, and unforeseen events. Protect your investment with comprehensive property insurance.
insurance.homeInsuranceDesc: Safeguard your home and belongings with our tailored home insurance packages. Coverage for contents, structure, and personal liability.
insurance.investmentProtectionDesc: Specialized insurance for investment properties. Protect your rental income and property value with our investment protection plans.
insurance.liabilityInsuranceDesc: Protect yourself against third-party claims and legal liability. Comprehensive coverage for property owners and landlords.
insurance.whyChooseUs: Why Choose O7 Realestates Insurance Services?
insurance.benefit1Desc: Our insurance specialists provide personalized advice based on your specific property needs and investment goals.
insurance.benefit2Desc: Access to the best insurance rates in Canada through our partnerships with leading insurance providers.
insurance.benefit3Desc: Streamlined claims handling to ensure quick resolution and minimal disruption to your property operations.
insurance.benefit4Desc: Round-the-clock customer support for all your insurance queries and emergency assistance.
insurance.ctaSubtitle: Get a free insurance quote today and secure your Canada real estate investment.
